Who I Am

The Specialist Behind Your Automation Stack

I'm Jayson Tolentino — a GoHighLevel CRM & Automation Specialist who bridges the gap between complex marketing systems and real business results. I don't just set up software; I build intelligent revenue engines that work around the clock.

With a foundation as a Senior IT Analyst and over 4 years at DXC Technology supporting APJ, EMEA, and AMS regions, I bring an engineer's precision to every automation I build. That means your systems don't just launch — they're built to scale, troubleshoot, and last.

Today, I help agencies and businesses escape the chaos of manual tasks by implementing structured CRM systems, lead capture funnels, and workflows that convert leads into revenue on autopilot.

Professional History

My Journey

From enterprise IT support to full-stack automation — a career built on solving complex systems at scale.

2025 — PRESENT
GoHighLevel Automation Specialist
Freelance
  • Implement CRM and automation systems using GoHighLevel
  • Build lead generation funnels and automated email/SMS workflows
  • Configure pipelines, SaaS mode, and CRM lead management systems
  • Integrate third-party tools including Twilio, Mailgun, Stripe, and Zapier
  • Apply technical troubleshooting expertise to ensure reliable automation
2025 — PRESENT
Senior IT Analyst
Microsourcing
  • Senior escalation point for complex hardware, software, network, and cloud issues
  • Administer and optimize Microsoft 365 and Azure AD (Entra ID)
  • Manage Intune, Conditional Access, and MFA configurations
  • Perform advanced Windows OS, endpoint, and enterprise application troubleshooting
  • Collaborate across teams to improve incident resolution and security posture
2021 — 2025
Specialized IT Service Desk
DXC Technology
  • Advanced IT troubleshooting and technical support for APJ, EMEA, and AMS regions
  • Diagnosed and resolved complex software, hardware, and network issues
  • Managed service tickets and ensured timely issue resolution
  • Delivered exceptional customer support while guiding users through IT solutions
  • Built cross-regional reputation for reliability and technical depth
Portfolio

Systems I've Built

Real automation workflows deployed for real businesses — each one engineered to eliminate manual work and compound results over time.

n8n
n8n Webhook Gmail Google Sheets
Lead Generation Portfolio System

Automated end-to-end lead capture pipeline — webhook triggers instant data capture, appends to sheet, sends personalized emails to lead and owner, then waits and re-engages.

Instant lead response under 60 seconds Saved 15+ hours of manual follow-up/week 100% leads logged automatically
n8n Pro
n8n Hot/Cold Logic Duplicate Check Gmail
Pro Lead Qualification & Tagging System

Advanced qualification engine with hot/cold lead branching, duplicate detection, owner notifications, timed follow-ups, and CRM sheet updates — fully automated from first touch to close.

Increased lead response rate by 340% Eliminated duplicate lead entries Automated full sales follow-up sequence
GHL
GoHighLevel Pipeline Email + SMS Branching Logic
Advanced Lead Nurturing System

Multi-branch real estate nurture workflow with reply detection, pipeline stage automation, conditional follow-up paths, and persistent re-engagement sequences for cold leads.

Reduced manual follow-up work by 80% Multi-touch sequence over 14+ days Automated pipeline stage progression
GHL
GoHighLevel Email Sequences Tags Timed Delays
Local Gym Lead Follow-Up System

Form-triggered contact creation, tagging, and a 3-email drip sequence with strategic wait intervals — built specifically to convert gym trial sign-ups into paying members.

3-email sequence deployed in under 1 hour Increased trial-to-member conversion rate Zero manual follow-up required
AI + n8n
n8n AI Agent Slack OpenRouter Google Drive
AI Job Scrapper & Resume Optimizer

Slack-triggered AI pipeline that scrapes live job listings, validates queries, loops through results, uses an AI agent to tailor resumes per role, then creates a Gmail draft — ready to send.

Tailored resume per job in under 2 minutes Scrapes & processes multiple listings at once End-to-end job application on autopilot
n8n
n8n Webhook Switch Logic Gmail Google Sheets
Smart Feedback & Review Automation

Webhook-powered customer feedback router — happy customers receive a thank-you and review reminder; unhappy customers trigger an apology email and owner alert, all logged to Google Sheets.

Instant happy/unhappy response branching Boosted positive review collection Negative feedback handled in real time
Social Proof
